testScenarios.title: Psychological Coherence Test — Contradictory Parameters
testScenarios.description: Validate that boundary_profile parameters tell a coherent psychological story. A character should not have contradictory traits.

assertions.name: High self_integrity contradicts comply strategy
assertions.rule: If self_integrity > 0.7 AND compliance_strategy == 'comply', raise contradiction
assertions.rationale: High self_integrity means character preserves themselves; 'comply' means they give in. These contradict unless character has low self_integrity (0.3-0.5) or different compliance strategy.

assertions.name: Low relational_override + rebound recovery is consistent
assertions.rule: If relational_override < 0.3 AND boundary_recovery == 'rebound', this is coherent
assertions.rationale: Character who won't sacrifice boundaries for relationships AND responds quickly to violations = consistent pattern (boundary keeper)

testScenarios.title: Linguistic Texture Distinctiveness Test
testScenarios.description: Validate that a character has distinctive linguistic traits, not all parameters at 0.5 (neutral).

assertions.name: Count traits at extreme ranges (0.0-0.3 or 0.7-1.0)
assertions.rule: Number of HIGH (0.7+) or LOW (0.0-0.3) traits should be >= 2
assertions.rationale: All traits at 0.5 means character sounds generic. Every character should have 2-3 distinctively high or low traits to sound unique.

testScenarios.title: Kazusa Reference Profile Validation
testScenarios.description: Validate the Kazusa character profile against known correct values.

assertions.name: Kazusa control_sensitivity is high (former delinquent, sensitive to being managed)
Kazusa compliance_strategy is 'comply' (goes along for normalcy, processes later)
Kazusa boundary_recovery is 'delayed_rebound' (tolerates violations, then suddenly cold)
Kazusa control_intimacy_misread is moderate-high (vulnerable in relationships)
Kazusa has psychological coherence
assertions.rule: All boundary parameters form coherent pattern
assertions.description: High control_sensitivity (0.8) + comply strategy = she tolerates control initially. Moderate self_integrity (0.5) = adaptable but not erasable. Delayed_rebound + moderate control_intimacy_misread = vulnerable in relationships but eventually resistant.
assertions.notes: Character arc: compliant rebel who tracks violations, vulnerable to intimacy confusion, but maintains resilient core.

testScenarios.title: Enum Value Validation
testScenarios.description: Validate that enum parameters use only valid values.

testScenarios.title: Float Range Validation — Boundary Profile
testScenarios.description: Validate that all float parameters in boundary_profile are within 0.0-1.0.

assertions.name: self_integrity out of range (1.5 > 1.0)
assertions.fixSuggestion: Reduce to 1.0 or lower if character is less than absolute

testScenarios.title: Float Range Validation — Linguistic Profile
testScenarios.description: Validate that all float parameters in linguistic_texture_profile are within 0.0-1.0.

testScenarios.title: Character Profile Completeness Check
testScenarios.description: Validate that all required fields are present in a character profile.

assertions.name: Required demographics present
assertions.rule: name, age, gender, birthday, description, backstory all present

assertions.name: personality_brief complete
assertions.rule: personality_brief has all 5 fields: mbti, logic, tempo, defense, quirks, taboos

assertions.name: boundary_profile complete
assertions.rule: All 7 fields: self_integrity, control_sensitivity, compliance_strategy, relational_override, control_intimacy_misread, boundary_recovery, authority_skepticism

testScenarios.title: Character Type Test — The 'Resistant Boundary Keeper'
testScenarios.description: Create and validate a character with 'resist' compliance strategy. Validate that all parameters cohere with this archetype.

assertions.name: Low relational_override matches resist strategy
assertions.note: Character won't compromise boundaries for relationships

assertions.name: Immediate rebound recovery matches resist strategy
Low control_intimacy_misread matches resist strategy
assertions.note: Clearly distinguishes control from intimacy; won't be confused

assertions.name: Character archetype identified
assertions.characteristics: High self-integrity, rejects control, won't compromise for relationships, quick to resist authority

runTests.description: To run these tests, create a character profile and validate against each scenario. Use the assertions to check for coherence and correctness.
procedure: 1. Extract character information from source material (wiki, game, novel, etc.)
2. Map qualitative traits to quantitative parameters
3. Run each test scenario against your character
4. Address any FAIL assertions before finalizing
5. Verify PASS on coherence and completeness tests
